paper_title: Facile isolation and analysis of sporopollenin exine from bee pollen

methods.description: Preparation of bee pollen samples by drying and compositional analysis for further experimental procedures.

steps.description: Bee pollen samples were dried in laminar air flow at 40 °C.
Compositional analyses of the samples are listed in Supplementary Material Table S1.
steps.searchable_summary: retrieve compositional analysis from Table S1

methods.method_name: Soxhlet Extraction for P1 Purification Phase
methods.description: Soxhlet extraction process to remove soluble compounds from bee pollen grains using various solvents.

steps.description: Soxhlet extractions of 100 g of bee pollen grains were performed in two types of extractors with different dimensions and cycle times.
steps.searchable_summary: perform Soxhlet extraction on bee pollen grains

steps.description: The overall time of the extraction was 7 h using 1 L of solvents (chloroform, isopropyl alcohol, and methanol).
steps.searchable_summary: conduct 7-hour Soxhlet extraction with specified solvents

steps.description: The amount of material extracted was determined after rotational evaporation and drying at 60 °C at 5 mbar for 1 h.
steps.searchable_summary: determine extracted material weight after evaporation and drying

steps.description: After methanol extraction, samples were combined, stirred in hot water, filtered, and dried until weight constancy.
steps.searchable_summary: combine and process samples post-methanol extraction

steps.description: A final Soxhlet extraction with acetone was performed, resulting in a brittle solid.

methods.method_name: Washes with Water and Isopropyl Alcohol
methods.description: Washing bee pollen grains with water and isopropyl alcohol to further purify the samples.

steps.description: Aqueous washes were performed with hot and room temperature water, stirring for 3 h.
steps.searchable_summary: wash bee pollen with hot and room temperature water

steps.description: Stirring in hot water was followed by filtering on a pre-heated glass filter and drying.
steps.searchable_summary: filter and dry pollen after hot water wash

steps.description: Stirring in room temperature water was followed by decantation and filtering.
steps.searchable_summary: decant and filter pollen after room temperature water wash

steps.description: Dry material was homogenized in isopropyl alcohol, stirred, filtered, and dried.
steps.searchable_summary: homogenize and process pollen in isopropyl alcohol

methods.method_name: Washes with Isopropyl Alcohol and Sodium Lauryl Sulfate
methods.description: Washing bee pollen grains with isopropyl alcohol and sodium lauryl sulfate solution for further purification.

steps.description: Bee pollen grains were mixed with isopropyl alcohol, stirred, filtered, and dried.
Samples were stirred in sodium lauryl sulfate solution, washed, filtered, and dried.
steps.searchable_summary: wash pollen with sodium lauryl sulfate solution

steps.description: Alternative protocol involved mixing pollen with sodium lauryl sulfate solution, centrifugation, and rinsing.
